eks.nodegroup.updateconfig.MaxUnavailabl.Docs: The maximum number of nodes unavailable at once during a version update. Nodes will be updated in parallel. This value or `maxUnavailablePercentage` is required to have a value.The maximum number is 100.

The maximum percentage of nodes unavailable during a version update. This percentage of nodes will be updated in parallel, up to 100 nodes at once. This value or `maxUnavailable` is required to have a value.
